metadata.analysisType: Dependency comparison for TailwindCSS + Radix UI migration

dotenv.notes: Good practice; current project uses import.meta.env

zod.notes: Useful for runtime validation; consider adding for type safety

react.notes: Safe minor version bump. No breaking changes between 18.2 and 18.3.

react-dom.notes: Sync with React version. Patch release, safe to upgrade.

react-router-dom.notes: Already aligned with template. Keep as-is.

@radix-ui/react-*.notes: Core of new design system - MAJOR ADDITION

@tanstack/react-query.notes: Optional; current project uses fetch directly

tailwindcss.notes: Foundation of new styling approach - CRITICAL

typescript.notes: Upgrade from implicit to explicit setup

phase1_mandatory.reason: Sync with template; bug fixes and performance
mitigations: Run full test suite after
Check for deprecation warnings
Paired with React upgrade
Review Vite 6, 7, 8 changelog for breaking changes
Test build process thoroughly
Check plugin compatibility (@vitejs/plugin-react)
breakingChanges: Config format changes in major versions

phase1_mandatory.reason: Vite major upgrade requires matching plugin
mitigations: Verify compatibility with Vite 8.0.2
Test JSX transformation and HMR

phase1_mandatory.reason: Bug fixes and improvements to test framework
mitigations: Run full test suite after upgrade
Check for new test APIs that might be useful

phase1_critical_additions.notes: Helps manage Tailwind + Radix component variants
Essential for dynamic Tailwind class binding
Prevents Tailwind class conflicts in variants
Replaces CSS animations with Tailwind classes

phase1_optional_but_recommended.benefit: Validates API responses at runtime; improves type safety
Modern toast UI; can replace current alert patterns
Professional icons; replaces emoji icons in UI

skip_for_frontend_only_migration: react-hook-form (form library; current uses React state)

risk1_major_vite_upgrade.description: Vite 5.0.7 -> 8.0.2 is 3 major versions; significant breaking changes likely
risk1_major_vite_upgrade.impact: Build process may break; plugin compatibility issues
mitigations: Review Vite migration guides for v6, v7, v8
Test in isolated branch first
Maintain backup of vite.config.ts
Check all plugins for compatibility (only using @vitejs/plugin-react)
risk1_major_vite_upgrade.rollbackPlan: Revert to v5.0.7 if critical issues; run npm install <old-version>

risk2_tailwind_configuration.description: Tailwind 3.4.17 requires new configuration approach; not drop-in replacement
risk2_tailwind_configuration.impact: CSS not generated correctly; styles won't apply; build errors
mitigations: Copy tailwind.config.ts from template as base
Customize colors/tokens for current brand (teal primary)
Set up postcss.config.js correctly
Import global.css in main entry point
Test CSS generation in dev and build
risk2_tailwind_configuration.rollbackPlan: Remove Tailwind setup and revert to inline styles

risk3_radix_ui_learning_curve.description: Team unfamiliar with Radix UI; significant API learning required
risk3_radix_ui_learning_curve.impact: Slower component migration; potential bugs in implementation
mitigations: Read Radix UI documentation thoroughly before starting
Create component pattern/template for each Radix UI type
Migrate one component type at a time (buttons, modals, forms, etc.)
Code review each Radix UI component migration
Write tests for each Radix UI component

risk4_test_compatibility.description: Playwright tests may break due to DOM structure changes with Radix UI
mitigations: Review TEST_SELECTOR_RISK_ASSESSMENT.md before migration
Update fragile selectors proactively (guest count, table headers)
Use getByRole for Radix UI components (semantic roles)
Run tests after each component migration
risk4_test_compatibility.rollbackPlan: Revert component and fix selectors incrementally

risk5_build_size_increase.description: Adding Tailwind, Radix UI, and utilities will increase bundle size
risk5_build_size_increase.impact: Slower initial page load; increased build time
mitigations: Enable Tailwind purging (default in v3.4)
Tree-shake unused Radix UI components
Code split with dynamic imports if possible
Measure bundle size before/after (npm bundle-analyzer)

risk6_color_scheme_change.description: New template uses purple + gold; current uses teal + green
risk6_color_scheme_change.impact: Visual changes may not match brand expectations
mitigations: Review design-tokens-mapping.json for color changes
Discuss with stakeholders before migration
Consider overriding template tokens for brand consistency
Get design approval before finalizing colors
risk6_color_scheme_change.rollbackPlan: Customize tailwind.config.ts to use current color palette

step1_prepare: Run full test suite on current code (baseline)
step4_testing: Update any selector issues (from risk assessment)
step6_ui_libraries: ...install other Radix UI packages as needed
git commit -m 'Add: Radix UI component library'
step7_migrate_components: git commit -m 'Migrate: Button component to Radix UI + TW'
Repeat for: Form inputs, Modal, Alerts, Tables

successCriteria.all_tests_pass: 41 tests pass without manual selector updates (except 4-5 identified)
successCriteria.no_build_errors: npm run build completes without errors
successCriteria.no_console_errors: Dev server runs without console errors or warnings
successCriteria.performance_maintained: Bundle size <10% increase; build time comparable
successCriteria.accessibility_preserved: All semantic roles and labels maintained
successCriteria.visual_fidelity: Design matches new template or approved customizations

color_scheme.question: Accept new purple primary + gold accent colors?
color_scheme.recommendation: Discuss with stakeholders; can override in tailwind.config.ts
options: Override template to keep teal + green
Hybrid: use template structure but customize colors

advanced_features.question: Include optional libraries (Sonner, Lucide, Zod)?
advanced_features.impact: Enhanced UX but additional learning curve
advanced_features.recommendation: Start with core (Tailwind + Radix). Add optional in Phase 2.
options: Phase 1: Add optional libraries for polish

react_query.question: Adopt TanStack React Query for data fetching?
react_query.recommendation: Phase 2 opportunity; not required for migration
react_query.notes: Current code uses fetch directly; could improve with React Query

rollbackProcedures.before_major_change: git tag v1-pre-upgrade && git checkout -b backup-branch
rollbackProcedures.if_tailwind_breaks: Remove tailwind/postcss, revert to inline styles in git
rollbackProcedures.if_radix_breaks: Revert individual component commits, keep others
